reviews.review_description: Beautiful experience, simple yet effective gameplay, highly engaging atmosphere, I’d love to see more games like this.

This is a time killer type game. The game play is simplistic. Walk, run, jump, swing your sword. Pretty much it. 

The visuals are thematic and beautifully done, well worth the buy for the price of a happy meal. If you use the Black Friday 40 off, even better.

The start menu by itself is worth a happy meal!

Now that I finished the game……

It’s really really short.  I mean SHORT!  25 minutes short! 

Those stuck at the last stage. Here’s a hint. 

The tutorial shows you!
For the price no brainer great graphics and sound the rain+wet showing up the stone as it did was great hats off to the devs 👍

What can I say the graphics are wonderful and this game is so diffrent  from so many others,and I love it sooooo much.
But it did feel like you was just getting started,I could see lots
 of opportunities for this game. Lots of levels  and even add on's who knows?
I can not wait to get more of this game and for the price you can not moan to get a taste of this beautiful game.*****

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! Your feedback means a lot to us, and we're excited to let you know that we’re already working on the sequel, which will feature more content, new characters, and even better graphics. Thanks again for your support.

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this game. With one exception I was able to figure out what I needed to do to advance at each phase. Then it was just a matter of not giving up until I finally did everything correctly. That said, I just couldn't figure out what I needed to do at what ended up being the final challenge. I contacted the developers and they helped me out right away. Bottom line .... great game and fantastic support. I hope they make more games like it!

Artax is a port of an Oculus Go game that was a huge classic. I have never played the original but this game is just as good now as I know it was back then. This game puts you in the shoes of a knight who is looking for his fellow solider in a fantasy diorama rpg adventure. The classic top down or god view is a staple here and might just be one of the originals to use this angle. The environments are designed very well as it captures a dark and gritty atmosphere where you never know what is coming next. The characters are clean and the animations are done properly too. I couldnt help but feel like I was playing Dark Souls while playing this game. The combat is a bit simple but it works very well with the game. The story is very captivating and it makes you want to keep progressing. There are even action scenes that really make this game an epic adventure. Well worth downloading if you played the original or if you want to see this game for the first time. Great RPG/Adventure to have in your library!

I bought it because I was curious about the fantasy look, and I was really surprised. The screenshots don't show that it's a miniature world , the graphics are beautiful, and the detail is amazing. It's a bit short, but... the price is short too.
I hope they make more games like this!

The game is very good there are some awesome set pieces. This style looks cool in the headset. I wish there were more games like this my only complaint is the whole game feels like the first level and there should have been a lot more to it but then for the price it's fair enough would love a fleshed out sequel

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback! We're thrilled to hear you enjoyed the game and appreciate your comments on the visuals and set pieces. We're excited to share that a sequel, Artax 2, is already in development, and it will feature much more content and new experiences. Your support means a lot to us, and we can’t wait for you to try the next installment!

reviews.review_title: Loved this on the GO headset
reviews.review_description:
Use to enjoy playing a. version of this on the GO headset. Controls very responsive and once you have done simplist of tutorials good to go. Spiders are smallish but extremely well done and give a good sense of menace     Only trouble is  it so short ,for the average player will take about 45 minutes to finish it. !!!           
 Perhaps one day gunjack will be available for the quest headset
